creator: andrej@ebert.su
text:
Created attachment 165017
py-subliminal update to 1.1.1

There's a new release, 1.1.1: https://github.com/Diaoul/subliminal/releases/tag/1.1.1

Just patched the Makefile and distinfo, everything seems to work on the latest portstree & FreeBSD 10.2-STABLE FreeBSD 10.2-STABLE #0 r292683.

Also, subliminal supports python3 since at least version 1.0, so i changed the
USES=python:2 to USES=python:2.7+, but i don't know if it's enough for use on a python3-only system, especially as there are apparently no python3-ports of the needed libraries.
